inst1:
Welcome to the Sample Questionnaire

This demonstration shows all supported question types.

You will see:
• Likert scales (strongly disagree to strongly agree)
• Visual analog scales (sliding scales)
• Multiple choice questions
• Text entry fields

Please answer honestly and thoughtfully.
q1: I am satisfied with this demonstration.
q3: How engaged are you with this task?
q6: Select all programming languages you know:
q7: What is your participant ID? (short answer)
q8: Please provide any additional comments or feedback: (long answer)
q9:
Image Display Demo

This is an image question type.

The image on the left shows a smiley face. This question type displays an image with descriptive text and waits for you to click NEXT.

No response is collected - this is useful for displaying instructions or information with an accompanying image.
q10:
Image Response Demo

This is an imageresponse question type.

The image shows the PEBL logo. Please type a brief description of what you see in the image below:
debrief:
Thank you!

You have completed the sample questionnaire demonstrating all 10 question types.

Your responses have been saved.
